resources.string:
Welcome to Game Space! We attach great importance to your personal information and privacy. In order to protect your rights and comply with relevant regulatory requirements, we explain to you as follows: This Privacy Policy will help you understand the following contents:
1.How We Collect and Use Your Personal Information
2.How We Store and Protect Your Personal Information
3.How We Share, Transfer and Disclose Your Personal Information
4.How Your Personal Information is Transferred Across Borders
5.Your Rights to Your Personal Information
6.How We Handle the Personal Information of Children
7.Third-Party Service Providers and Services
8.Supplement and Update of the Policy
9.How to Contact Us
The Terms of Use will help you understand the following contents:
1.Game Space and its Services
2.Restrictions on the use of This Software and Service
3.Intellectual Property; Ownership
4.Considerations on Your Use of This Software and Service
5.About Updates
6.Software and Services Provided by Third Parties
7.Fees and Advertisement
8.Termination and Breach of Contract
9.Indemnification, DISCLAIMERS, LIMITATION OF LIABILITIES, Governing Laws and Dispute Resolution and Miscellaneous
Abeg press di link below to read di %1$s and %2$s.
E no dey available for di current app condition
Equilibrum Mode go share di resources dem according to di game and di performance of di fone.
Show WhatsApp and Messenger messages in di form of barrages
E dey plug in, e no fit charge now
Charging Through Bypass dey reduce di heating effect of di fone and e dey extend di battery life.

When your fone dey connected to di original charger when you dey game, di power supply go bypass di battery to power di fone directly, e dey reduce di heating of di fone and e dey extend di battery life.
Charging Through Bypass dey on. Di battery charging efficiency go dey reduced
Charging Through Bypass dey on. Di battery charging go stop
Di percentage of di power you dey use to charge di battery
Start dey charge after di battery level don too low.
Color inversion dey help to clearly identify di characters dem wey dey move for di games dem, e dey increase your winning chances dem
Change di Foto colors of PUBG
Change di Foto colors of PUBG
Slide inward from di panel handle to activate Smart Panel
E no dey supported for now
Data of Di Last 7 Days Dem
Set di ET engine for game optimization
You go comot battery saving mode if you on Esports-grade Control.
Magic voices dey free to use
On dis feature for 2 apps dem
Choose 2 apps dem to on window wey dey float while you dey play di games dem.
Di Settins Dem For Di Windows Wey Dey Float
Only 2 apps dem dey supported for di window wey dey float
2 apps dem dey required for di window wey dey float
Improve di network stability when you dey play games. New users dem fit try am free for some days
Change your voice when you dey play di games dem
See di game duration, how e dey use di data.
Slide to show di Game Model Panel
You don dey play for 2 hours. Go chill before you continue.
You don dey play for 4 hours. Go chill before you continue.
After 2 hours dem of non-stop play or 4 hours dem of gaming in total
Wen you on am, game shortcuts go don hide for di home screen again. Open and manage all games for %1$s so di home screen go clean and you go get smooth gaming experience.
%1$s E need Notifications permission to push notifications anytime new games wey you download enter.
\"%1$s\" don add to %2$s. Tap am to view.
No %1$s strategies dey for %2$s. You fit go to %3$s from di game to add one (e only dey supported for games wey dey landscape-oriented).
Make you select game app from di list. Di app wey you don select go run for game mode.
E don enter di Game Mode
Epp you win for di starting line
Block di reminders dem oda than incoming calls and alarms dem
Give vibration for some places for inside game
Make you optimize CPU and GPU performance automatically so that e go improve game experience
You don already adjust to di best condition
You don already adjust to di best condition. But you go still need pay attention to %1$s.
Reduce di screen brightness to protect your eye
Dey take break to relax your eyes dem
Add di screen brightness to protect your eye
Pay attention to your surroundings dem when you dey move
No dey lie down for your back for long when you dey use your fone
On health and safety reminders dem regarding your eyes dem, sitting posture, anti-addiction system, etc.
Di volume dey too much for earphones dem
Add your games dem wey you like go Game Space
Make di footsteps dem louder with di enhanced audio source
All di settins dem for di performance panel go return go back their original state.
Once you on am, Gaming Temperature Control fit effectively reduce di fone temperature and prolong gaming time.
Use your brain adjust di game parameters dem to dey sure of better gaming experience for a long time
Esports-grade Control don dey on. Device temperature fit increase.
Make touch work fast with full-link touch control technology, but e go make device dey hot and batteri go dey finish quick.
Higher indexes dem dey show say e no too dey suck batteri and longer battery life.
Higher indexes dem dey show better video quality.
Higher indexes dem dey show better game control experience.
Higher indexes dem dey show slower temperature rise.
You don get%d day(s) dem of free VIP successfully
已开启极致帧率，将为您提供120fps游戏体验
开启后将为你提供120fps的极致游戏体验，但可能导致发热问题。
To Prevent Navigation Gestures From Touching by Imself
When \"Take Screenshot with 3 Fingers\" dey off, you no fit take screenshot with 3 fingers dem.
When you play games while you dey charge, Di Smart Charge go reduce di batteri power of di batteri, e go reduce di heating effects of di fone and extend di batteri life.
Press di icon app icon to add am
Improve di control response speed through full-link optimizing of touch and show, but dis one go cause di fone to heat up.
Di below listed features dey available to you.
Set di in-game frame rate to \"High\" den on dis feature.
You fit start in-game mapping if you press di volume buttons dem +/-.
Graphic Enhancement no dey available for Eye Care mode.
已开启优化功耗，将为您提供流畅60fps游戏体验
开启后将为你优化发热和功耗，并提供60fps的高帧游戏体验
Di new name no fit be di same with di original
Di passphrase no correct. Abeg try am again

Smartly identify different game operation zones and optimize correctly to provide di best gaming touch experience. When dis one dey on, e go detect touch zones for di first match of each gaming session.
After Wi-Fi don off, you go use fone data instead.
E dey optimize di perception of texture on top di suface of di object, di stronger di texture dey, di higher di rating go dey.

How di game texture take fine reach. If you adjust am backwards e dey reduce Foto quality and e dey boost performance. (If you shift am up e dey soften di Foto and e dey boost performance, if you shift am down e dey improve Foto sharpness.)
Adjust am for higher Foto quality or higher processing speed.
Anoda app dey use di recording device. Abeg close di app first
All di features dem on %1$s go dey available for this game after you don download am.
E no dey available at all
You don already get di free VIP
Predict di high CPU usage to reduce frame drop and hanging
Join us to enjoy magic sound transformation privileges
Netwok connection no dey. Abeg check di netwok condition
Change your voice for games for real time.
You fit use %1$s share your feedback or use %2$s take follow us talk.
Di Magic Button dey allow you to map di functions dem for di screen to di physical volume buttons dem, den e dey customize di function of di volume buttons for games dem.
Long press den drag the + or - button to di area wey you wan map and trigger
Set di functions of di volume button for di game dem
After you don finish to map di volume button functions. You no dit use di volume buttons to adjust volume again, but you fit bring up panel to do am.
Bring up di SmartPanel den use am to adjust di volume
How I go adjust di volume when di Magic button dey on?
Long press and drag di \"+\" to di Fire button
You fit on/off di mapping function of each of di volume button and press Next to set up functions dem for each button.

You fit customize di function of di volume buttons for games dem. For example, drag di \"+\" button for di game screen, den save di settin and enter di game. Now you fit click di Volume Up button to start dey shoot.
E no dey available at all
Increased sensitivity dey improve touch effects dem, den reduced sensitivity dey improve control stability and e dey reduce interference and fake touches dem.
When e dey on, e dey provide control experience for di games dem and e dey reduce control response time.
How E Dey Respond When You Swipe
Na di way e dey take respond go determine how you fit swipe am. If e slow to respond, visuals go dey stable anytime you swipe am.
Di message alat method during di games dem.
Higher accuracy go make you fit identify exact micro controls beta, while lower accuracy go reduce how sensitive di controls go dey but e go make di system more stable.

"Thank you for your trust and say you dey use our products and services. To give you our products and services, we go need access di internet, get some permissions dem from your fone, and use your personal info: 1. As per your permission, we go collect your system account info for login. 2. As per your permission, we go collect your order info and fone numba to finish di order payment and give dem services wey you go pay for. Di legal basis for how we process your data na your consent or contract with you. If you tap Gree, e mean say you don sabi and get agreement with di terms wey dey for our User Agreement and Privacy Policy."
By Pressing GREE, you don gree to di terms wey we state for our %s and %s.
How you go protect network change
No dey automatically connect to Wi-Fi when you dey use mobile network.
Smartly select Wi-Fi and fone data to reduce slow network. E fit chop fone data even wen Wi-Fi network don connect.
E prefer to dey sure of network resources for dis games with di proprietary game technology to make di network beta.
No network connection. Please check your network and %s
Messages dem from di non-allowlisted apps dem no go get alat again during gameplay.
Window wey dey float no dey supported for di current scene
Show WhatsApp and Messenger messages wey dey di game screen in di form of barrages
We don copy di order number
Pull am down to load am again
Di page don finish to refresh
Release am to Load am again
Di highest character limit don reach
As you click GREE, you gree to di terms wey dey inside our %s and %s.
As you click GREE, you gree to di terms wey dey inside our User Agreement and Privacy Policy.

We dey thank you for ya trust and using our products and services. To provide our products and services, e need to use Internet and e need some permissions dem from ya phone, and e also need to collect and use some of ya data. Di reason for our processing nah to improve user experiences and to provide service to you. Di legal basis wey we dey process ya data nah ya data consent of di law for dis mata.
This keeps it in view until you unpin. Touch & hold Back and Overview to unpin.
To unpin this app, swipe up & hold
Slide di panel comot from di side of di game interface.

Performance Mode go improve di performance of di fone and e dey suitable for competitive games dem. When you on am, di Foto quality go dey higher, but e go increase di batteri wey e dey suck and heat of di device. We dey Suggest say make you play am for inside areas wey no dey too hot.
"We need some of the permissions you rejected or the system failed to apply failed, please manually set to the page authorize, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
"You have rejected us to apply for authorization, please agree to authorization, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
Enhance di Foto quality throughout di games dem
You don play am for %1$s today
Press to view %1$s and %2$s. When you press \"Agree\", you don gree to our permission settins dem and di agreement.
Battery Saving Mode go low how di device dey work and extend di batteri life. E dey work for games wey no need high foto quality.
%1$s go take effect after you don restart di game, abeg restart di game.
Di custom optimization for dis game go dey off after di game don start again
Custom optimization for dis game go dey on after di game don start again
Change voice in real time for games. Put %1$s.
E don already dey best state
Data no dey available. Abeg try am again later
Ray tracing: e dey come up on %s
Mimic real lighting effects to create extra natural game visuals.
E no see di video load. Abeg try am again later
I don read and gree to %1$s.

%1$s don detect large fluctuations in di game network during di last game, with %2$d cases of serious network delay and di maximum network latency of %3$d ms. To dey on di game network acceleration fit help you reduce di latency to %4$d ms and add di network speed by %5$d%%
You wan off Game Mode for this game?
System navigation need to dey triggered twice back-to-back make di game no leave accidentally.
When di Game Mode dey on, off di automatic brightness temporarily to make sure say di occlusion no dey affected.
Make you show di Game Assistant Panel for better game experience.
Set di apps dem under Game Mode.
E don reach di highest point
Dem dey show personalize %1$s strategies dem for Di Game Assistant Panel for here. You fit import or share strategies dem.
Strategy no enter. Abeg check whether di model go fit work well together
Strategy don land successfully. Check for di right game wey match
Copy di %1$s passphrase and share am with your padi. Models wey %2$s method support: %3$s
Smart Cooling when you dey Game
Hold am den drag di top to change di position.
Hold am den drag am to change position
Slide inside to on Smart Panel den open apps dem for windows wey dey float.
Powerfully provide smart features dem such as real-time captioning and full-screen translation for certain scenarios dem.
Open di apps for windows wey dey float quick-quick
Features of Game mode no dey supported now for split-screen mode
Failed to boost. Please check your network and try again
We dey prepare di data. Abeg wait
Don get already. Abeg, no claim again
Dis fit increase di batteri wey e dey suck & fone temperature.
Network connection no dey. Abeg check your network den try am again
Abeg put SIM card den try am again
Login don expire. Abeg log in again.
Di total time wey dem don play:
Personalize control sensitivity and how e dey respond based on your preference and level of your skill.
Di tap response dey extra sensitive, suitable for MOBA games.
Di operation dey extra responsive, suitable for shooting games dem.
Di touch response dey extra sensitive and accurate, suitable for most ganes dem.
You fit improve your watching experience by effectively stopping di alats dem from disturbing you.
Swipe and hold from di edges dem of di screen to open di Video assistant panel
New users dem fit get %d day(s) dem of free VIP
I don read and gree to di %s.
Welcome to Di Xunyou Game Turbo
